title: Generate Reports from Board
excerpt: Are there any options other than Excel for generating reports from boards? I’m open to add ons and integrations.

posts.author: Tammynikki (Tamara Hunter)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there any options other than Excel for generating reports from boards? I’m open to add ons and integrations.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tamara!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

Could you specify what kind of reporting you’re looking to generate? This will help us make sure we can recommend the appropriate apps or features to use!

To generate reports from a board on monday.com, you can use the views on your board, such as the Chart View, to reflect a visual breakdown of the data. You can also create a dashboard to get an overview of what’s happening across multiple boards and use widgets like the Chart Widget to view and compare data.

Let us know if those ideas work or if you need something to be generated outside of monday or more downloadable like a PDF!

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Tammynikki,
Certainly! Monday.com offers various options for generating reports from boards, and there are alternatives to Excel for this purpose. Here are some features and alternatives you can explore:
Dashboard:
1)Monday.com provides customizable dashboards where you can visualize data from your boards in a visually appealing manner.
2)You can create widgets like charts, graphs, and progress trackers to represent your data.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tammynikki When it comes to integrations, I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful. It provides a drag & drop UI for creating reports and you can schedule them to be sent to the selected recipients daily/weekly/monthly. Here’s an example report:

It can contain charts and lists of tasks, and you can add your own commentary in between,
Once you schedule it, the recipients start receiving weekly project status reports that are automatically generated with the most up-to-date data.

You can learn more about this add-on, or start a free trial to give it a try with your own data.

posts.author: johannesgeyer (Johannes Geyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tammynikki ,

You can try our new app PDF Report Generator?

You can use the report builder to create your own layout for the PDF report, or if you need more flexibility, create a docx template. The app uses Word templates with placeholders. So you can specify which columns you want to export and create your own design. You can also use tables inside the Word template to reproduce the look of monday or create your own version.
https://www.pdfreportgenerator.com/help/template/

As a starting point, you can also use one of the pre-made templates from our Template Gallery.

SingleProject800×562 30.9 KB

It’s also possible to create a monday automation so that the report is automatically send via email every day / week / month.

If you need more advanced features like QR codes or custom email templates, try DocExport PDF Generator .

Both apps work with formulas, mirror-columns, images, Charts and so on.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us: support@towerapps.com
